name: Continue
description: The server has received the request headers and the client should proceed to send the request body.

name: Switching Protocols
description: The server is switching protocols as requested by the client, e.g. upgrading to WebSocket.

name: Processing
description: WebDAV: the server has received and is processing the request, but no response is available yet.

name: Early Hints
description: Used to return response headers before the final HTTP message, allowing preloading of resources.

name: OK
description: Standard success response. The request has succeeded.

name: Created
description: The request has succeeded and a new resource was created as a result.

name: Accepted
description: The request has been received but not yet acted upon; it may be processed later.

name: Non-Authoritative Information
description: The response is a transformation of a 200 OK from another source (e.g. a proxy).

name: No Content
description: There is no content to send for this request, but headers may be useful.

name: Reset Content
description: Tells the client to reset the document view (e.g. clear a form).

name: Partial Content
description: The server is delivering only part of the resource due to a Range header sent by the client.

name: Multi-Status
description: WebDAV: conveys information about multiple resources in situations where multiple status codes might be appropriate.

name: Already Reported
description: WebDAV: members of a DAV binding have already been enumerated in a previous reply to this request.

name: IM Used
description: The server has fulfilled a GET request for a resource and the response is a representation of the result of one or more instance-manipulations.

name: Multiple Choices
description: The request has more than one possible response; the client should choose one.

name: Moved Permanently
description: The URL of the requested resource has been changed permanently. The new URL is given in the response.

name: Found
description: The URI of the requested resource has been changed temporarily. Further changes may be made in the future.

name: See Other
description: The server directs the client to get the requested resource at another URI with a GET request.

name: Not Modified
description: Used for caching. Tells the client the response has not been modified, so the cached version can be used.

name: Use Proxy
description: Deprecated. The requested resource must be accessed through a proxy provided in the Location header.

name: Temporary Redirect
description: The request should be repeated with another URI, but future requests should still use the original URI.

name: Permanent Redirect
description: The resource is now permanently located at another URI, specified by the Location header. Unlike 301, the request method must not change.

name: Bad Request
description: The server cannot or will not process the request due to a client error (e.g. malformed syntax).

name: Unauthorized
description: Authentication is required and has failed or not yet been provided.

name: Payment Required
description: Reserved for future use. Sometimes used by APIs to indicate quota has been exhausted.

name: Forbidden
description: The client does not have access rights to the content. Unlike 401, the client's identity is known to the server.

name: Not Found
description: The server cannot find the requested resource.

name: Method Not Allowed
description: The request method is known by the server but is not supported by the target resource.

name: Not Acceptable
description: No content conforming to the criteria given by the client in the Accept headers is found.

name: Proxy Authentication Required
description: Similar to 401 but authentication is needed to be done by a proxy.

name: Request Timeout
description: The server did not receive a complete request within the time it was prepared to wait.

name: Conflict
description: The request conflicts with the current state of the server (e.g. edit conflict).

name: Gone
description: The requested content has been permanently deleted from the server, with no forwarding address.

name: Length Required
description: The server rejects the request because the Content-Length header is not defined.

name: Precondition Failed
description: One or more conditions given in the request header fields evaluated to false.

name: Content Too Large
description: The request entity is larger than limits defined by the server.

name: URI Too Long
description: The URI requested by the client is longer than the server is willing to interpret.

name: Unsupported Media Type
description: The media format of the requested data is not supported by the server.

name: Range Not Satisfiable
description: The range specified by the Range header in the request cannot be fulfilled.

name: Expectation Failed
description: The expectation indicated by the Expect request header field cannot be met by the server.

name: I'm a teapot
description: The server refuses to brew coffee because it is, permanently, a teapot. (RFC 2324 / HTCPCP)

name: Misdirected Request
description: The request was directed at a server that is not able to produce a response for the combination of scheme and authority.

name: Unprocessable Content
description: The request was well-formed but could not be followed due to semantic errors (e.g. validation failure).

name: Locked
description: WebDAV: the resource being accessed is locked.

name: Failed Dependency
description: WebDAV: the request failed because it depended on another request that failed.

name: Too Early
description: The server is unwilling to risk processing a request that might be replayed.

name: Upgrade Required
description: The client should switch to a different protocol specified in the Upgrade header.

name: Precondition Required
description: The origin server requires the request to be conditional to prevent 'lost update' problems.

name: Too Many Requests
description: The user has sent too many requests in a given amount of time (rate limiting).

name: Request Header Fields Too Large
description: The server is unwilling to process the request because its header fields are too large.

name: Unavailable For Legal Reasons
description: The user agent requested a resource that cannot legally be provided (e.g. censored content).

name: Internal Server Error
description: The server has encountered a situation it does not know how to handle.

name: Not Implemented
description: The request method is not supported by the server and cannot be handled.

name: Bad Gateway
description: The server, while acting as a gateway or proxy, received an invalid response from an upstream server.

name: Service Unavailable
description: The server is not ready to handle the request. Common causes: maintenance or overload.

name: Gateway Timeout
description: The server, acting as a gateway, did not get a response from an upstream server in time.

name: HTTP Version Not Supported
description: The HTTP version used in the request is not supported by the server.

name: Variant Also Negotiates
description: The server has an internal configuration error: the chosen variant is configured to engage in content negotiation itself.

name: Insufficient Storage
description: WebDAV: the method could not be performed because the server cannot store the representation needed to complete the request.

name: Loop Detected
description: WebDAV: the server detected an infinite loop while processing the request.

name: Not Extended
description: Further extensions to the request are required for the server to fulfil it.

name: Network Authentication Required
description: The client needs to authenticate to gain network access (e.g. captive portal).
